team_name: TenderLens AI — Explainable AI Platform for Tender Evaluation & Eligibility Analysis
summary: Design an AI platform to automate, standardize, and explain tender evaluation for government organizations like CRPF. The platform uses OCR, NLP, and human-in-the-loop validation to parse bidder submissions, match extracted data against criteria, generate explainable eligibility decisions, and produce audit-ready reports.
